title: roadmap/version/v0.4 labels in tracker and GitHub

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
Ensure tracker taxonomy and GitHub labels align with v0.4 seed versions.

## Landed

- Restored [`docs/roadmap-labels.md`](../../docs/roadmap-labels.md) at superrepo root (mirrors `beskid_tracker/docs/roadmap-labels.md`)
- `setup-github-labels.sh` includes `roadmap/version/v0.4`

## Remaining

- Confirm `roadmap/version/v0.4` label exists on Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid (operator: `bash beskid_tracker/scripts/setup-github-labels.sh`)
- Scoped export smoke after production webhook validation

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `tracker-implementation`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`
